landing.features_sub: Follow your favourite series, unlock rewards and connect with fans in a single crew log.

dashboard.title: Personal dashboard
dashboard.text: Real-time notifications, last episode watched and your series progress, all in one control center.

social.title: Built-in social
social.text: Post your takes, like, comment and repost. Follow other fans and discover the best of the crew.

content.title: Organized content
content.text: Chapters and arcs structured chronologically, unlocked gradually as you advance.

gamification.title: Levels & rankings
gamification.text: Every episode earns XP. Climb the ranks, unlock collectibles and compete on global leaderboards.

progress.title: Series progress
progress.text: Map every saga and arc. Your LogPose always points to where your adventure is headed.

mobile.title: Mobile-first
mobile.text: Smooth, fast navigation tuned for any screen size, so your journey never stops.

footer.disclaimer: LogPose is a fan app for tracking One Piece progress. For personal use only, not for commercial purposes.
